summary: Ran the targeted axisGeneration Vitest file and mapped the passing test cases back to the contract assertions for schema validity, prompt contents, and malformed-output handling.

assertions.reason: The verbose test run passed the case returns 3-5 valid axis suggestions for study managers, covering valid axis schema generation.
The verbose test run passed the case includes pack metadata and existing axis keys in the prompt, proving prompt composition includes the expected pack inputs.
The verbose test run passed the case throws a descriptive ConvexError when the model returns malformed JSON, confirming graceful malformed-output handling.

frictions: Vitest still prints the existing test.workspace deprecation warning before the targeted tests run.
